narrative.narrative: Extreme fear is gripping the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, mirroring the capitulation environment of August 2024 when smart money began accumulating. Stablecoin reserves are quietly swelling, suggesting sidelined capital is positioning for re-entry at these washed-out levels. Historically, when anxiety reaches this intensity alongside rising dry powder, the subsequent snap-back has punished those who waited for perfect clarity.
narrative.headline: Blood in the Streets, Dry Powder Rising

consensus.key_reasoning: The Fear & Greed Index at 25 anchors the phase in Panic (24-31), and while swelling stablecoin reserves signal stealth accumulation, the broad divergence across 8 momentum and flow factors means the bottom is not yet confirmed. The strong 79.5% pattern match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom is compelling but does not override the current washed-out position on the ladder, warranting patience over aggressive deployment.
disagreements_noted: Analyst calls Anxiety (39-46) but a Fear & Greed score of 25 legally sits in Panic (24-31), requiring a one-rung correction downward.
Narrative leans toward an imminent snap-back and accumulation setup, while the analyst's diverging factors suggest the bottom lacks confirmation.
Analyst assigns RISK_OFF with 0.62 confidence; narrative implies a more bullish re-entry framing at 0.79 confidence.
